title: calyptrocalyx geonomiformis
intro: Calyptrocalyx geonomiformis, also known as the Spiny Cycad Palm, is a type of palm tree native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Calyptrocalyx geonomiformis are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
